brand_identity.domain: Premium Financial Services / Corporate Executive Assessment

rules.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-none text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-gray-900
rules.labels: text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-gray-500
rules.anti_pattern_avoidance: Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Never center-align long form content.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy (p-8 to p-16) for an uncluttered, executive feel.

grids.form_layout: Max-width of 3xl, centered but left-aligned text within.
grids.dashboard_mode: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.

components.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B1320]/85 border-b border-white/10. Logo on left, user context on right.
components.form_card: Pure white (#FFFFFF) container with rounded-lg. Ambient shadow: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]. 1px border: border-gray-100.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E87A00] to-[#D4AF37] text-white font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-3 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-md px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.outline_inverse: border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#0B1320] transition-colors

components.inputs: Shadcn based. Use bottom-border only (material style) or standard subtle borders. Focus state MUST be ring-1 ring-[#D4AF37].
components.progress_bar: Fixed to top of the white form card. 2px height. Filled section uses primary gradient.
components.toast_notifications: Use Sonner for autosave drafts ('Draft saved at X:XX'). Position: bottom-right.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-1px]. Cards translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow. Always use transitions (duration-200).
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: High contrast ring for accessibility. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:outline-none focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-white.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Fade in for multi-step form transitions.

hero_background.description: Modern dark navy glass skyscraper. Used as the landing page right-side visual or background with heavy opacity overlay (bg-[#0B1320]/80).

logo_placeholder.description: Leadway camel silhouette sunset logo. To be clipped circular and placed in header.

landing.layout: Navy background split screen. Left: H1 Title (Cormorant), Subtitle (Manrope), Confidentiality note, Countdown Timer (Large Display), 'Start Assessment' button. Right: Abstract navy glass architecture image.
landing.countdown_timer: Show days, hours, minutes until April 8, 2026. Gold accent text.

multi_step_form.layout: Navy background. Centered white card (max-w-3xl) containing the form. 8 sections with clear progress bar.
multi_step_form.features: Autosave drafts, validations, multi-selects, rating scales.

review_submit.layout: Accordion style or clean list summarizing all answers. Final 'Submit Assessment' CTA.

thank_you.layout: Centered success message on white card. Next steps for the April 8-10 training.

admin_dashboard.layout: Dashboard grid layout on a light gray or white background for maximum readability of charts, or keep navy shell with white widget cards.
admin_dashboard.features: Shadcn/Recharts for scoring (AI Readiness, Opportunity Density, Governance Sensitivity), Data tables for submissions, CSV Export.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, checkboxes) MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-assessment-button').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on navy and dark text on white.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: Deep Navy base (#0B1320), White cards (#FFFFFF), Gold accents (#D4AF37).
Apply fonts globally: 'Cormorant Garamond' for all headings (H1-H3), 'Manrope' for body, inputs, and labels.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layout to ensure creative freedom, but use Shadcn for the Form inputs, Dashboards, and UI widgets.
Implement a smooth multi-step form experience. You can mock the autosave API, but show the UX state (e.g., 'Draft saved' toast).
Include a functional countdown timer to April 8, 2026 on the landing page.
Dashboard should visually distinct from the form. Use Recharts for the scoring visualizations.
